entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A grain legume cultivated in Ethiopia for grain production and soil fertility amelioration.

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted.

entities.name: DEBRE ZEIT RESEARCH CENTER
entities.description: The research center where the chickpea evaluation took place.

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form for the plant.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced by the crop.

entities.name: SEED FILLING DURATION
entities.description: The time period during which the seeds fill.

entities.name: NUMBER OF POD PER PLANT
entities.description: The count of pods produced per individual plant.

entities.name: SHOOT NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen fixed specifically in the shoot.

entities.name: GRAIN HARVESTING INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biological yield.

entities.name: GRAIN PRODUCTION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of the plant in producing grain.

entities.name: NUMBER OF NODULES
entities.description: The count of root nodules formed by symbiotic bacteria.

entities.name: N FIXED IN BIOMASS
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen fixed within the plant biomass.

entities.name: N FIXED IN GRAIN
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen fixed within the grain.

entities.name: NITROGEN HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of nitrogen in the grain to the total nitrogen in the plant.

entities.name: GRAIN N YIELD
entities.description: The yield of nitrogen specifically in the grain.

entities.name: SHOOT N YIELD
entities.description: The yield of nitrogen specifically in the shoot.

entities.name: BIOMASS N YIELD
entities.description: The yield of nitrogen in the total biomass.

entities.name: NODULE DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The dry weight of the root nodules.

entities.name: SHOOT PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The protein concentration in the shoot.

entities.name: GRAIN PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The protein concentration in the grain.

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: The nitrogen content of the plant.

entities.name: HERITABILITY ESTIMATION
entities.description: The process of estimating the proportion of phenotypic variance due to genetic variance.

entities.name: CORRELATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: The statistical analysis of the relationship between two or more traits.

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to minimize the effect of environmental variation.

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to estimate GCA and SCA for heritability estimation.

entities.name: FIXED MODEL EXPECTATIONS OF MEAN SQUARES
entities.description: A statistical method used to calculate GCA and SCA.

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to improve specific traits.

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method involving the mating of selected parents to improve traits.

entities.name: GCA
entities.description: General Combining Ability.

entities.name: SCA
entities.description: Specific Combining Ability.

entities.name: NARROW SENSE HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variance due to additive genetic variance.

entities.name: SYMBIOTIC TRAITS
entities.description: A group of traits related to the symbiotic nitrogen fixation process.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: A group of traits related to the overall agricultural performance of the crop.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to provide essential nutrients for plant growth.
